sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.67 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Suppose that$$is an automorphism of a finite soluble group$G$, and let$r$be the (Pr\"ufer) rank of the fixed-point subgroup$C_G( )$. Is the Fitting height of$G$bounded terms of$| |$and$r$? This is known to be true in the case where$| |$is a product of at most two prime powers (B.\,Hartley, Preprint, 1994, ). An affirmative answer to this question would imply an affirmative answer to 13.8(b).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
